title: Senate Republicans Block War Powers Limits as Mideast Crisis Widens
summary_full: The Defense Department released the name of a fifth American killed in an Iranian attack on Sunday, and released the name of another soldier believed to have died in the same incident. The State Department said a charter flight was returning to the U.S. with Americans wanting to leave the region.
